sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this strategy/simulation game

special_mechanics.name: Equipment Burden
special_mechanics.description: Captain carries excess equipment which affects movement speed - heavier load results in slower movement for captain and entire army

physics_values.speed_modifier: qualitative: inversely proportional to equipment weight

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Weather Effects
special_mechanics.description: Deforestation causes weather pattern changes (increased rain/snow) which makes movement slower on affected terrain

tier_notes: Tier 3: PowerMonger is a real-time strategy/simulation game, not a character action platformer. No documented jump physics, gravity values, or sub-pixel systems exist. Movement is primarily strategic army positioning with distance-based command lag. Individual character physics are not mechanically detailed in available documentation.
